title: Isolate stdlib provisioning root per CLI e2e invoker

source.subject: fix(e2e): isolate stdlib provisioning root per CLI invoker

body:
Isolates **stdlib provisioning root** per CLI e2e test invoker to prevent cross-test pollution.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`6e82a32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/6e82a32)
- **Subject:** fix(e2e): isolate stdlib provisioning root per CLI invoker
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
End-of-band test stability for nested corelib provisioning.
